steps.name: Prepare report directories
steps.command: mkdir -p "$REPORT_ROOT/replay" "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc9_12" "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc13_14" "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc15" "$REPORT_ROOT/self-check/gcc9_12" "$REPORT_ROOT/self-check/gcc13_14" "$REPORT_ROOT/self-check/gcc15" "$REPORT_ROOT/release" "$REPORT_ROOT/gate" "$TARGET_DIR"

steps.name: Capture host build environment
steps.command: python3 ci/gate_capture_environment.py --output "$REPORT_ROOT/gate/build-environment-host.json" --mode host --toolchain-file rust-toolchain.toml

steps.name: Build GCC 12 CI image
steps.command: docker build --build-arg GCC_IMAGE=gcc:12 -t gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc12 -f ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile .

steps.name: Capture GCC 12 CI environment
steps.command: python3 ci/gate_capture_environment.py --output "$REPORT_ROOT/gate/build-environment-gcc12.json" --mode ci-image --toolchain-file rust-toolchain.toml --dockerfile ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile --docker-base-image gcc:12 --docker-image-tag gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc12

steps.name: Build GCC 13 CI image
steps.command: docker build --build-arg GCC_IMAGE=gcc:13 -t gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc13 -f ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile .

steps.name: Capture GCC 13 CI environment
steps.command: python3 ci/gate_capture_environment.py --output "$REPORT_ROOT/gate/build-environment-gcc13.json" --mode ci-image --toolchain-file rust-toolchain.toml --dockerfile ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile --docker-base-image gcc:13 --docker-image-tag gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc13

steps.name: Build GCC 15 CI image
steps.command: docker build --build-arg GCC_IMAGE=gcc:15 -t gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc15 -f ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile .

steps.name: Capture GCC 15 CI environment
steps.command: python3 ci/gate_capture_environment.py --output "$REPORT_ROOT/gate/build-environment-gcc15.json" --mode ci-image --toolchain-file rust-toolchain.toml --dockerfile ci/images/gcc-matrix/Dockerfile --docker-base-image gcc:15 --docker-image-tag gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc15

steps.name: cargo xtask check
steps.command: cargo xtask check

steps.name: Representative acceptance replay
steps.command: cargo xtask replay --root corpus --subset representative --report-dir "$REPORT_ROOT/replay"

steps.name: Replay stop-ship contract
steps.command: python3 ci/gate_replay_contract.py --replay-report "$REPORT_ROOT/replay/replay-report.json" --output "$REPORT_ROOT/gate/replay-stop-ship.json"

steps.name: Build wrapper binary in GCC 12 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc12 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc12 && cargo build --bin gcc-formed"

steps.name: Wrapper self-check in GCC 12 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -v "$REPORT_ROOT:/reports" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc12 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc12 && /tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc12/debug/gcc-formed --formed-self-check > /reports/self-check/gcc9_12/report.json"

steps.name: Representative GCC 12 snapshot check
steps.command: cargo xtask snapshot --root corpus --subset representative --check --docker-image gcc:12 --version-band gcc9_12 --report-dir "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc9_12"

steps.name: Build wrapper binary in GCC 13 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc13 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc13 && cargo build --bin gcc-formed"

steps.name: Wrapper self-check in GCC 13 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -v "$REPORT_ROOT:/reports" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc13 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc13 && /tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc13/debug/gcc-formed --formed-self-check > /reports/self-check/gcc13_14/report.json"

steps.name: Representative GCC 13 snapshot check
steps.command: cargo xtask snapshot --root corpus --subset representative --check --docker-image gcc:13 --version-band gcc13_14 --report-dir "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc13_14"

steps.name: Build wrapper binary in GCC 15 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc15 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc15 && cargo build --bin gcc-formed"

steps.name: Wrapper self-check in GCC 15 image
steps.command: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/workspace" -v "$TARGET_DIR:/tmp/gcc-formed-target" -v "$REPORT_ROOT:/reports" -w /workspace gcc-formed-ci:pr-gcc15 bash -lc "export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc15 && /tmp/gcc-formed-target/gcc15/debug/gcc-formed --formed-self-check > /reports/self-check/gcc15/report.json"

steps.name: Representative GCC 15 snapshot check
steps.command: cargo xtask snapshot --root corpus --subset representative --check --docker-image gcc:15 --version-band gcc15 --report-dir "$REPORT_ROOT/snapshot/gcc15"

steps.name: Vendor dependency tree
steps.command: cargo xtask vendor --output-dir vendor > "$REPORT_ROOT/release/vendor.json"

steps.name: Hermetic release build smoke
steps.command: cargo xtask hermetic-release-check --vendor-dir vendor --bin gcc-formed --target-triple x86_64-unknown-linux-musl > "$REPORT_ROOT/release/hermetic-release.json"

steps.name: Release packaging smoke
steps.command: package signed musl artifact and write $REPORT_ROOT/release/package.json

steps.name: Release install smoke
steps.command: install packaged release, run --formed-version, and uninstall

steps.name: Rollback symlink smoke
steps.command: cargo test -p xtask rollback_switches_current_symlink_to_requested_version > "$REPORT_ROOT/release/rollback-smoke.txt"

steps.name: System-wide layout smoke
steps.command: install packaged release into pseudo-root system layout and uninstall

steps.name: Release repository promote and pin smoke
steps.command: publish release repository, promote canary/beta, resolve beta, install exact version, and uninstall

steps.name: Release provenance manifest
steps.command: python3 release provenance manifest writer

steps.name: Dependency and license gate
steps.command: cargo install cargo-deny --locked && cargo deny check > "$REPORT_ROOT/release/cargo-deny.txt"
